title: Seeking 2015 The Last Year of Ryohji Kaji
display_title: Seeking 2015 The Last Year of Ryohji Kaji
wikitext:
[]: Seeking 2015: The Last Year of Ryohji Kaji             Quote Post by CrazedOtakuStew » Fri Feb 25, 2011 1:07 pm 2015: The Last Year of Ryohji Kaji I have been trying to find this book all day but no luck what so ever. HELP ME!

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Fri Feb 25, 2011 1:42 pm It's very rare. Don't expect to be able to find it affordably, but the wiki contains all the English text in the book.

[]: Re: Where in the hell can I find this!?             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri Feb 25, 2011 1:58 pm CrazedOtakuStew wrote: 2015: The Last Year of Ryohji Kaji I have been trying to find this book all day but no luck what so ever. HELP ME!

[]:             Quote Post by shito » Fri Feb 25, 2011 8:27 pm If you don't mind paying a bit extra for service shopping (celga, mukunoki, etc), Yahoo Auctions Japan is the best place: http://page22.auctions.yahoo.co.jp/jp/auction/l72890643 1,200 yen (1 day left, no bids yet) or buy it now for 2,000 yen: http://page18.auctions.yahoo.co.jp/jp/auction/w44770572 either way I'm sure you'll end up paying less for what they're asking at eBay. As far as I know the book isn't really that rare.

[]: It's not that rare at all, it seems.             Quote Post by Killer Bee » Fri Feb 25, 2011 8:57 pm I got mine off ebay for $40, which is a lot less than it would take to hire a middleman to get you one off YJA.

[]:             Quote Post by z23 » Fri Mar 04, 2011 1:01 pm must admit i bought one of these the other day! cant wait for it to come with my other eva books :p now i've got to get the 2.0 box!!! the hunt is on!

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri Mar 04, 2011 1:22 pm If anyone is curious about the book of its textual information, we do have that information on the wiki: http://wiki.evageeks.org/2015:_The_Last_Year_of_Ryohji_Kaji

[]:             Quote Post by CrazedOtakuStew » Sat Apr 09, 2011 1:19 am Think I found one! Now i'm waiting on a reply from someone then I pull the trigger on the old bank card!

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sat Apr 09, 2011 5:59 pm CrazedOtakuStew wrote: Think I found one! Now i'm waiting on a reply from someone then I pull the trigger on the old bank card!

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Sat Apr 09, 2011 11:28 pm In my mind I read this as SEAKING 2015: The Last Year of Ryohji Kaji and am thus terribly disappointed.

[]:             Quote Post by CrazedOtakuStew » Sun Apr 10, 2011 7:59 am sorry to dissapoint...
